evaluations.name: Local Multi-Cluster Setup
evaluations.description: User can successfully create 2 isolated vclusters on Docker Desktop and deploy test workloads
success_criteria: Both vclusters running (vcluster list returns 2 clusters)
Deployments ready in both clusters (replicas available)
Services accessible within each cluster (DNS resolution works)
Cluster isolation verified (cluster-a pods not visible from cluster-b)
evaluations.resources_required: 4GB RAM, Docker Desktop with K8s enabled

evaluations.name: Cloud Deployment (GKE)
evaluations.description: User can deploy vcluster to GKE and validate observability integration
success_criteria: Same manifests work as local testing
evaluations.resources_required: GKE cluster with Cloud Logging/Monitoring enabled

evaluations.name: Troubleshooting & Diagnostics
evaluations.description: User can diagnose and fix common vcluster issues using diagnostic runbook
success_criteria: Identify root cause of pod failures
Fix image pull errors with imagePullSecrets
Understand when to escalate vs. fix locally

evaluations.name: Pre-Deployment Validation
evaluations.description: User validates vcluster setup against Kubernetes API parity checklist
success_criteria: All API parity checks pass (Deployments, Services, RBAC, Storage, Networking)
Cloud integration tests pass (if cloud deployment)
